input.currentText: [fixture] Even where the domain is complex, the onboarding should distinguish complexity-of-domain from complexity-of-interface — only the latter is an apology for bad UI.
input.parentText: [fixture] That ignores the role of user education — some products require onboarding because the domain is genuinely complex, not because the UI is bad.
input.threadContextExcerpt: [fixture] Debate room: Long onboarding is an apology for bad UI. Depth 2 counter-rebuttal.
